title: bupleurum rotundifolium subsp. protractum
intro: Bupleurum rotundifolium subsp. protractum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a type of plant in theApiaceae family, native to China and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which help to relieve fever, reduce pain, and boost the immune system. Bupleurum rotundifolium subsp. protractum is used to treat various health conditions, including rheumatism, bronchitis, and menstrual disorders, and is also said to have antioxidant and anti-aging effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
